Condition: Source observations and backed-up v2 observation parquet agree
Normal verification input: Newly downloaded or previously cached upstream files in UK_AQ_HISTORY_INTEGRITY_SOURCE_CACHE_DIR
What is compared: Source-cache observations, mapped through v2 core, versus observation parquet in the Dropbox backup
Important note: The source-cache files are the authoritative source evidence for observation completeness.

Condition: v2 observation parquet is missing, invalid, or incomplete, and authoritative source data is available
Normal verification input: Newly downloaded or previously cached upstream files in UK_AQ_HISTORY_INTEGRITY_SOURCE_CACHE_DIR
What is compared: Source-cache observations, mapped through v2 core, versus observation parquet in the Dropbox backup
Repair input: The same source-cache files and v2 core mappings
Repair action: Run one scoped v2 observation backfill for the affected connector, day, and timeseries set
Repair write target: Cloudflare R2 History, CIC-Test bucket: uk-aq-history-cic-test
Immediate post-repair verification: Read the repaired observation parquet directly from Cloudflare R2 History and compare it with source-cache evidence
Next step: Verify or rebuild manifests from the final repaired observs
Important note: Do not wait for the Dropbox backup to refresh before immediate repair verification.

Condition: Required source file or safe v2 mapping is unavailable
Normal verification input: Source adapter result and v2 core mapping tables
Normal R2 read location: Local Dropbox mirror may still be read for reporting
What is compared: Available source evidence versus backed-up observation data
Repair action: Do not repair this scope; report operator action
Next step: Stop this scope; continue unrelated scopes
Important note: Do not build manifests or aqilevels from observation data that cannot be verified.

Condition: Pollutant, connector, and day manifests are complete and consistent
Normal verification input: Verified final observation parquet plus existing child manifests
Normal R2 read location: Normal check: local Dropbox mirror under R2_history_backup/history/v2/observations
What is compared: Manifest child keys, hashes, counts, and hierarchy references versus the verified observation parquet and sibling manifests
Important note: Manifests and indexes are one high-level Metadata task, but manifests are always checked first.

Condition: A pollutant, connector, or day manifest is missing, stale, incomplete, or inconsistent
Normal verification input: Verified final observation parquet and the complete sibling-manifest set
Normal R2 read location: Normal check: local Dropbox mirror; during a repair run use current Cloudflare R2 children
What is compared: Parquet-derived pollutant evidence and complete child manifests versus each parent manifest
Repair input: Final verified observation parquet and all valid sibling manifests
Repair action: Rebuild bottom-up: pollutant manifest, then connector manifest, then day manifest
Repair write target: Cloudflare R2 History, CIC-Test bucket: uk-aq-history-cic-test
Immediate post-repair verification: Freshly read every changed manifest directly from Cloudflare R2 History and validate exact body, hash, and hierarchy
Important note: Build manifests only after observ repair is complete, so they are written once from the final data.

Condition: Observation index, latest, and metadata objects correctly represent the final day manifests
Normal verification input: Verified final day manifests and existing index objects
Normal R2 read location: Normal check: local Dropbox mirror under R2_history_backup; repair validation: Cloudflare R2 History
What is compared: Final day-manifest keys and metadata versus index, latest, and timeseries metadata objects
Important note: Indexes are checked after manifests because indexes depend on the final manifest hierarchy.

Condition: Index, latest, or metadata objects are missing, stale, or inconsistent
Normal R2 read location: Normal check: local Dropbox mirror; during repair use current Cloudflare R2 manifests
What is compared: Final verified day-manifest set versus the existing index/latest/metadata objects
Repair action: Rebuild only the affected observation index, latest, and metadata objects
Repair write target: Cloudflare R2 History, CIC-Test bucket: uk-aq-history-cic-test
Immediate post-repair verification: Freshly read every changed index object directly from Cloudflare R2 History and validate its exact content
Important note: Do not rebuild indexes before all manifest changes for the day are complete.

Normal verification input: Current Cloudflare R2 child keys and exact object bodies
What is compared: Expected complete child set versus the actual live child set
Repair action: Block dependent index and aqilevel repair for this scope
Next step: Stop this scope; continue unrelated scopes
Important note: Aqilevels must not be rebuilt from an unverified observation hierarchy.

Condition: Every expected AQI UTC hour exists for eligible pollutants
Normal verification input: Final verified observation parquet, grouped by timeseries and UTC hour, plus v2 core AQI eligibility
Normal R2 read location: Normal check: local Dropbox mirror under R2_history_backup/history/v2/aqilevels
What is compared: Expected eligible UTC-hour identities from observs versus actual aqilevel UTC-hour identities
Important note: Do not compare raw observation-row counts with AQI-row counts.

Condition: Expected AQI UTC hours are missing, or aqilevel parquet/manifests are invalid
Normal verification input: Final verified observation parquet and v2 core AQI eligibility
Normal R2 read location: Normal check: local Dropbox mirror under R2_history_backup/history/v2/aqilevels
What is compared: Expected eligible UTC-hour identities versus actual aqilevel UTC-hour identities and AQI metadata
Repair input: Final verified observs after manifest/index verification
Repair action: Run one scoped v2 aqilevel rebuild for the affected connector and day
Repair write target: Cloudflare R2 History, CIC-Test bucket: uk-aq-history-cic-test
Immediate post-repair verification: Read repaired aqilevel parquet and metadata directly from Cloudflare R2 History and verify all expected UTC hours
Important note: Run aqilevel repair only after observs, manifests, and indexes are verified.

Condition: Pollutant is not AQI eligible, for example O3
Normal R2 read location: No aqilevel comparison required for that pollutant
Important note: O3 may need observ or metadata repair, but not aqilevel repair.

Normal verification input: Source-cache for observs; current Cloudflare R2 objects for repaired observs, manifests, indexes, and aqilevels
Normal R2 read location: Immediate post-repair check must use Cloudflare R2 History, not a potentially stale Dropbox backup
What is compared: Source evidence and final live Cloudflare R2 state across all four items
Repair action: Run one final integrity verification pass; do not start a second repair loop automatically
Immediate post-repair verification: Confirm observs, manifests, indexes, and aqilevels are all healthy
Important note: The Dropbox mirror can be checked again after its next successful backup refresh.

Condition: Any issue remains after the final pass
Normal verification input: Final live verification evidence and integrity report
Normal R2 read location: Cloudflare R2 History for repaired scopes; source-cache for observation truth
What is compared: Expected final state versus actual final state
Repair action: Fail the run and report the exact remaining scope
Next step: Investigate or retry in a later run
Important note: Avoid repeated writes when the underlying cause has not been resolved.
